master_token.description: Bearer token required for all REST API requests. Change from the default before deploying.
master_token.title: Master Token

max_depth.description: Maximum nesting depth for sub-agent delegation (1 = no sub-agents).
max_depth.title: Max Depth

max_concurrent.description: Maximum number of sub-agents allowed to run concurrently.
max_concurrent.title: Max Concurrent

default_sub_model.description: Default LLM model for sub-agents. Falls back to the root agent's model when empty.
default_sub_model.title: Default Sub Model

allowed_models.description: Allowlist of model names sub-agents may use. Empty means all models are allowed.
allowed_models.title: Allowed Models

max_iters.description: Deprecated. The tool-use loop now runs until natural completion (model returns text without tool calls). This field is retained for API backward compatibility but is not enforced.
max_iters.title: Max Iters

sub_agent_max_steps.description: Deprecated. Sub-agents now run until natural completion. This field is retained for API backward compatibility but is not enforced. Safety is provided by session_step_budget, stall detection, and LLM timeouts.
sub_agent_max_steps.title: Sub Agent Max Steps

llm_call_timeout.description: Ceiling in seconds for a single model.ainvoke() call. Covers extended-thinking models. On timeout, the call is retried up to llm_call_retries times before cascading to fallback models.
llm_call_timeout.title: Llm Call Timeout

llm_call_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for the primary model before cascading to fallback_models. Each fallback model gets one attempt.
llm_call_retries.title: Llm Call Retries

default_denied_tools.description: Tool IDs denied to all sub-agents by default (e.g. spawn_agent).
default_denied_tools.title: Default Denied Tools

edit_tool.description: File editing mechanism override: 'search_replace_block' (Aider-style SEARCH/REPLACE blocks) or 'structured_patch' (per-file exact string replacement). Leave empty (default) to auto-select based on the active model via llm.structured_patch_models.
edit_tool.title: Edit Tool

plan_mode_shell_allowlist.description: Shell command prefixes allowed during plan mode. Each entry matches a command at a word boundary (e.g. 'git log' matches 'git log --oneline' but not 'git logger'). Commands containing pipes, redirects, variable expansion, command substitution, or chaining (|, >, <, &, ;, $, backtick) are always rejected. Set to an empty list to disable shell in plan mode entirely.
plan_mode_shell_allowlist.title: Plan Mode Shell Allowlist

plan_mode_allow_mcp.description: Allow ALL user-enabled MCP tools (tools with kind='mcp') during plan mode. Matches Claude Code's permissive default and trusts the user's mcp.json configuration. Set to false to block MCP tools in plan mode regardless of their read-only status.
plan_mode_allow_mcp.title: Plan Mode Allow Mcp

web_ide.description: Optional 'Open in Web IDE' feature config (code-server containers).

CLIConfig.description: Terminal CLI display and interaction settings.

disable_textual.description: Disable the Textual TUI and fall back to plain Rich output.
disable_textual.title: Disable Textual

approval_style.description: Tool-approval UI style: 'inline' (plain prompt), 'textual' (TUI dialog), or 'aider' (diff-style).
approval_style.title: Approval Style

CLIConfig.title: CLIConfig

ChatConfig.description: Legacy config section kept for backward compatibility with app.json files.

port.description: TCP port for the legacy chat interface.
port.title: Port

address.description: Bind address for the legacy chat interface.
address.title: Address

ChatConfig.title: ChatConfig

CompactionConfig.description:
Summarization prompt selection for conversation compaction.

``caveman_mode`` enables a rule-augmented prompt (inspired by the
``JuliusBrussee/caveman`` Claude Code skill) that instructs the
summarizer LLM to drop articles, filler, pleasantries, and hedging
while preserving code, paths, URLs, and error strings verbatim.
Reduces output tokens in the compaction summary without changing the
``<analysis>/<summary>`` response structure downstream parsers expect.

caveman_mode.description: Enable caveman-style terse summarization prompt. Drops articles, filler, pleasantries, and hedging in the compacted summary while preserving code, file paths, URLs, and error strings verbatim. Reduces compaction output tokens without changing the response structure downstream parsers expect.
caveman_mode.title: Caveman Mode

CompactionConfig.title: CompactionConfig

ContextConfig.description: Context window selection and event filtering.

recent_event_limit.description: Maximum number of recent events injected into the context window.
recent_event_limit.title: Recent Event Limit

selection_threshold.description: Relevance score threshold (0.0-1.0) for the context selector to keep an event.
selection_threshold.title: Selection Threshold

selection_enabled.description: Enable LLM-based context event selection. When false, all recent events are used.
selection_enabled.title: Selection Enabled

context_selector_model.description: Model ID for context selection. Falls back to llm.default_model when empty.
context_selector_model.title: Context Selector Model

ContextConfig.title: ContextConfig

enabled.description: Enable the Home Assistant tool for smart-home control.
enabled.title: Enabled

token.description: Long-lived access token for Home Assistant authentication.
token.title: Token

matcher.description: Optional fnmatch pattern to limit which tool IDs trigger this hook.
matcher.title: Matcher

timeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait for the hook to finish.
timeout.title: Timeout

HooksConfig.description: External shell hooks fired during the session lifecycle.

pre_tool_use.description: Hooks executed before each tool invocation.
pre_tool_use.title: Pre Tool Use

post_tool_use.description: Hooks executed after each tool invocation.
post_tool_use.title: Post Tool Use

on_session_start.description: Hooks executed when a new session begins.
on_session_start.title: On Session Start

on_session_end.description: Hooks executed when a session ends.
on_session_end.title: On Session End

HooksConfig.title: HooksConfig

LLMConfig.description: LLM provider connection and model selection.

api_base.description: Optional base URL override. Leave empty for direct provider access (LiteLLM routes automatically from the model prefix). Set only when using a proxy (e.g. LiteLLM, Bifrost).
api_base.title: Api Base

api_key.description: API key for the LLM provider (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI) or proxy master key.
api_key.title: Api Key

default_model.description: Model ID using 'provider/model' syntax. LiteLLM auto-routes to the right API endpoint. When using a proxy, adjust the prefix to match its routing.
default_model.title: Default Model

action_plan_model.description: Model ID for action-plan generation. Falls back to default_model when empty.
action_plan_model.title: Action Plan Model

tool_model.description: Model ID used by individual tools. Falls back to default_model when empty.
tool_model.title: Tool Model

title_model.description: Model ID for session-title generation. Falls back to default_model when empty.
title_model.title: Title Model

compact_models.description: Priority-ordered list of models for context compaction. On failure, the next model in the list is tried. The keyword "default" resolves to the running agent's model. Example: ["anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "default"]
compact_models.title: Compact Models

fallback_models.description: Ordered list of fallback model IDs. On retryable LLM failure, the system tries each in order after exhausting retries on the primary model. Empty = no fallback.
fallback_models.title: Fallback Models

proxy_model_prefix.description: LiteLLM provider prefix prepended to model names when api_base is set. LiteLLM strips this prefix before forwarding the model name to the proxy, so the proxy receives the model ID it advertises in /v1/models. Leave as 'openai' for LiteLLM proxy, Bifrost, and OpenRouter. Only relevant when api_base is configured.
proxy_model_prefix.title: Proxy Model Prefix

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort hint for supported models. One of low, medium, high, none, or empty.
reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Effort

reasoning_effort_models.description: Model name patterns that support the reasoning_effort parameter.
reasoning_effort_models.title: Reasoning Effort Models

structured_patch_models.description: Model IDs (or glob prefixes ending in '*') that prefer the structured_patch edit tool over search_replace_block. Built-in defaults cover GPT-5/o3/o4/Codex/GPT-4; only set this to override or extend.
structured_patch_models.title: Structured Patch Models

LLMConfig.title: LLMConfig

servers.description: Override or extend built-in server definitions. Set {"pyright": {"disabled": true}} to disable a built-in, or add custom servers with command/extensions/root_markers.
servers.title: Servers

enabled.description: Enable Langfuse tracing for all LLM calls.
enabled.title: Enabled

project_id.description: Langfuse project ID for constructing dashboard URLs.
project_id.title: Project Id

uri.description: MongoDB connection URI (includes host, port, credentials).
uri.title: Uri

database.description: MongoDB database name for session storage.
database.title: Database

policy_path.description: Path to a JSON or TOML permission policy file. Empty uses built-in defaults.
policy_path.title: Policy Path

approval_mode.description: Default approval mode: 'ask' prompts the user, 'allow' auto-approves, 'deny' blocks.
approval_mode.title: Approval Mode

enabled_plugins.description: Plugin names to enable. Empty = all installed plugins. Format: 'plugin-name' or 'plugin-name@marketplace'.
enabled_plugins.title: Enabled Plugins

marketplaces.description: GitHub repos containing marketplace.json plugin indexes.
marketplaces.title: Marketplaces

install_path.description: Override install path for Truss-managed plugins. Defaults to $TRUSS_HOME/plugins/ (via resolve_truss_home).
install_path.title: Install Path

ProjectConfig.description: A project directory exposed to the REST API for session scoping.

path.description: Absolute path to the project root. Tilde (~) is expanded.
path.title: Path

description.description: Short human-readable description of the project.
description.title: Description

ProjectConfig.title: ProjectConfig

enabled.description: Enable a reflection LLM pass after tool execution to verify results.
enabled.title: Enabled

model.description: Model ID for the reflection pass. Falls back to llm.default_model when empty.
model.title: Model

log_level.description: Logging verbosity. One of DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL.
log_level.title: Log Level

log_style.description: Log output style for the core engine (empty for default).
log_style.title: Log Style

cli_log_style.description: Rich console log theme for the CLI (dark or light).
cli_log_style.title: Cli Log Style

preflight_enabled.description: Run connectivity checks for LLM, Langfuse, and Home Assistant on startup.
preflight_enabled.title: Preflight Enabled

cache_dir.description: Directory for tool caches. Defaults to $TRUSS_HOME/cache.
cache_dir.title: Cache Dir

session_dir.description: Directory for session transcripts. Defaults to $TRUSS_HOME/sessions.
session_dir.title: Session Dir

result_export_dir.description: Directory for large tool result exports. Empty to disable.
result_export_dir.title: Result Export Dir

projects_home.description: Directory for virtual project folders. Defaults to $TRUSS_HOME/projects.
projects_home.title: Projects Home

mongodb.description: MongoDB connection settings (used when driver is 'mongodb').

default_context_window.description: Default context window size in tokens used when the model is not listed in model_context_windows.
default_context_window.title: Default Context Window

auto_compact_threshold.description: Fraction of the context window (0.0-1.0) that triggers automatic conversation compaction.
auto_compact_threshold.title: Auto Compact Threshold

model_context_windows.description: Override only: per-model context window in tokens. Keys are model names (with or without provider prefix). The authoritative source is LiteLLM's model catalogue; populate this only to cap below the model's real max, or for models LiteLLM doesn't know yet.
model_context_windows.title: Model Context Windows

WebIdeConfig.description: Config for the per-session code-server "Open in Web IDE" feature.
WebIdeConfig.title: WebIdeConfig

description: Typed configuration for the Truss runtime.

hooks.description: External hooks fired during the session lifecycle (command or http).

channels.description: Chat platform channel adapters (nextcloud-talk, slack, etc.).
channels.title: Channels

projects.description: Named project directories exposed to the REST API for session scoping.
projects.title: Projects

title: AppConfig
